Home/AI Agents
18 Agent Types

AI Agents for every function.

Named systems with specific jobs. Not "AI solutions" — an AI Receptionist, a WhatsApp Agent, a Document Intelligence Agent. Each one deployed in 3–4 weeks with public pricing.

4 agents

Voice AI Agents

Phone calls handled by AI — inbound and outbound, human-sounding, in Hindi and regional languages.

AI ReceptionistAppointment BookingOutbound Follow-UpPayment Reminders
View 4 agents →
4 agents

Chat & Support Agents

Text-based agents on WhatsApp, your website, and Instagram — for commerce, support, and lead qualification.

WhatsApp Business AgentWebsite Support AgentLead Qualification AgentInstagram DM Agent
View 4 agents →
4 agents

Knowledge (RAG) Agents

Agents that know your documents, policies, and data — and answer accurately from them.

Internal Knowledge AgentDocument Intelligence AgentCustomer Docs AgentCompliance & Policy Agent

3 agents

Sales & Growth Agents

Research prospects, write personalised outreach, and keep your CRM current — automatically.

Lead Research AgentOutreach AgentCRM Copilot

3 agents

Operations Agents

Generate reports, process invoices, and screen candidates — the work that has to happen but doesn't need a human.

Reporting AgentInvoice & Data Entry AgentRecruiting Agent
